intro: Prosaptia brassii, also known as the "Brassii fern," is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Prosaptia brassii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
